user
The folder at `/private/tmp/alder_channel_energy` contains Alder Works' September 2026 production-energy channel closes and README. Calculate the total electricity used by production operations during September, in kWh, rounded to one decimal place.

codex

/bin/bash -lc "rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"'" in /private/tmp/alder_channel_energy

september_channel_closes.csv

exec
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' README.md && printf '\\n--- CSV ---\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' september_channel_closes.csv" in /private/tmp/alder_channel_energy
 succeeded in 0ms:
# Alder Works — September energy archive

`september_channel_closes.csv` contains the stabilized daily kWh close returned by every active production-energy channel at Alder Works' 12 workshops. Channel identifiers follow the electrician's commissioning labels and are retained for maintenance lookup.

Office, exterior-lighting, and HVAC loads are outside this export. Every channel reported `OK` health throughout September.

--- CSV ---

exec
/bin/bash -lc "awk -F, 'NR == 1 { next } { sum += "'$5; count++; if ($3 !~ /''^2026-09-/) other++; if ($6 != "OK") bad++; site[$2] += $5 } END { printf "records=%d'"\\nraw_total=%.2f\\nrounded_one_decimal=%.1f\\nout_of_month=%d\\nnon_ok=%d\\n\", count, sum, sum, other, bad; for (s in site) printf \"%s %.2f\\n\", s, site[s] }' september_channel_closes.csv | sort" in /private/tmp/alder_channel_energy
 succeeded in 0ms:
AW-01 58779.25
AW-02 60346.20
AW-03 58276.66
AW-04 61781.55
AW-05 58421.61
AW-06 61114.56
AW-07 64558.07
AW-08 61228.40
AW-09 64112.74
AW-10 62577.30
AW-11 64228.06
AW-12 59336.07

records=4320

codex
Summed all 4,320 September production-channel closes: 734,760.47 kWh, rounded to one decimal place.

FINAL_ANSWER: 734760.5
tokens used
13,697
Summed all 4,320 September production-channel closes: 734,760.47 kWh, rounded to one decimal place.

FINAL_ANSWER: 734760.5
